issues.title: Missing route-level regression tests for /dashboard/ protection
issues.attack: Plan has no integration test proving the core fix works. Existing tests only cover active users on /dashboard/.
issues.response: Both codex and gemini confirmed this gap. Will add tests for all 4 membership states.

issues.title: Verification command uses unavailable --timeout flag
issues.attack: pytest-timeout not in pyproject.toml. --timeout=30 will fail.
issues.response: Confirmed pytest-timeout not in deps. Will use 'uv run pytest -v' instead.

issues.title: Fixture normalization incomplete in dashboard test file
issues.attack: test_p13_dashboard.py local fixtures also lack explicit status.
issues.response: Design spec scopes fixture update to tests/conftest.py only. Local fixtures in test_p13_dashboard.py are separate and functionally correct via model default.

issues.title: No tests for core feature (duplicate of I-R1-01)
issues.attack: Three of four user states completely unverified.
issues.response: Merged with I-R1-01. Cross-validation by both models confirms severity.

issues.title: dashboard_actions and dashboard_team left unprotected
issues.attack: Only main dashboard view protected; sub-routes bypass restriction.
issues.response: t05 explicitly covers all remaining views including dashboard partials. Adding them here is scope creep per dispatch instructions.

issues.title: Fixture update redundant due to model default
issues.attack: Membership.status defaults to ACTIVE, so explicit status is unnecessary.
issues.response: Accept incorrect justification, rebut removal of the change. Keep for explicitness but reword justification.
